title: helictotrichon filifolium subsp. cazorlense
intro: Helictotrichon filifolium subsp. cazorlense, also known as Cazorla Needle Grass, is a subspecies of the Helictotrichon filifolium plant, a type of ornamental grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Helictotrichon filifolium subsp. cazorlense include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made through infusion or decoction of its leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or poultices for medicinal purposes.
